articles.title: Birçok ili sağanak ve fırtına vurdu. Ağaçlar devrildi, çatılar uçtu
articles.title_tr: Birçok ili sağanak ve fırtına vurdu. Ağaçlar devrildi, çatılar uçtu
articles.summary: Gaziantep ve Şanlıurfa'da şiddetli rüzgarın etkisiyle ağaçlar devrildi, bazı binaların çatıları uçarken, sokakta park halindeki araçlar büyük zarar gördü. Şanlıurfa'da bir kişi hayatını kaybederken, çok sayıda kişi yaralandı. Gaziantep'te ise olumsuz hava koşullarından kaynaklı kazalarda 23 kişi yaralandı.

articles.title: Scientists just discovered what coffee is really doing to your gut and brain
articles.title_tr: Scientists just discovered what coffee is really doing to your gut and brain
articles.summary: Coffee doesn’t just energize—it actively reshapes the gut and mind. Researchers found that both caffeinated and decaf coffee altered gut bacteria in ways linked to better mood and lower stress. Decaf even improved learning and memory, while caffeine boosted focus and reduced anxiety. Together, they show coffee works through multiple pathways beyond just caffeine.
articles.summary_tr: Coffee doesn’t just energize—it actively reshapes the gut and mind. Decaf even improved learning and memory, while caffeine boosted focus and reduced anxiety. Together, they show coffee works through multiple pathways beyond just caffeine.
articles.long_summary: Coffee doesn’t just energize—it actively reshapes the gut and mind. Decaf even improved learning and memory, while caffeine boosted focus and reduced anxiety. Together, they show coffee works through multiple pathways beyond just caffeine.

Decaf even improved learning and memory, while caffeine boosted focus and reduced anxiety. Together, they show coffee works through multiple pathways beyond just caffeine.

articles.title: Malaria didn’t just kill early humans, it shaped who we became
articles.title_tr: Malaria didn’t just kill early humans, it shaped who we became
articles.summary: Long before humans spread across the globe, a deadly disease may have quietly shaped where our ancestors lived—and even how we evolved. New research reveals that malaria didn’t just threaten early human survival; it actively pushed populations away from high-risk regions across Africa, fragmenting groups over tens of thousands of years. This separation influenced how different populations met, mixed, and exchanged genes, helping shape the genetic diversity we see today.
articles.summary_tr: Long before humans spread across the globe, a deadly disease may have quietly shaped where our ancestors lived—and even how we evolved. New research reveals that malaria didn’t just threaten early human survival; it actively pushed populations away from high-risk regions across Africa, fragmenting groups over tens of thousands of years. This separation influenced how different populations met, mixed, and exchanged genes, helping shape the genetic diversity we see today.
articles.long_summary: Long before humans spread across the globe, a deadly disease may have quietly shaped where our ancestors lived—and even how we evolved. New research reveals that malaria didn’t just threaten early human survival; it actively pushed populations away from high-risk regions across Africa, fragmenting groups over tens of thousands of years. This separation influenced how different populations met, mixed, and exchanged genes, helping shape the genetic diversity we see today.
articles.long_summary_tr: Long before humans spread across the globe, a deadly disease may have quietly shaped where our ancestors lived—and even how we evolved. New research reveals that malaria didn’t just threaten early human survival; it actively pushed populations away from high-risk regions across Africa, fragmenting groups over tens of thousands of years. This separation influenced how different populations met, mixed, and exchanged genes, helping shape the genetic diversity we see today.
why_important: Teknolojik ve akademik gelişmelere katkı sağlaması
possible_impacts: Yeni keşifler farklı alanlara yön verebilir

articles.title: Bournemouth move into European places as unbeaten run continues with Palace win
articles.title_tr: Bournemouth move into European places as unbeaten run continues with Palace win
articles.summary: Bournemouth moved one step closer to securing European football for the first time in their history after climbing into sixth with a 3-0 win against Crystal Palace at home.
articles.summary_tr: Bournemouth moved one step closer to securing European football for the first time in their history after climbing into sixth with a 3-0 win against Crystal Palace at home.
articles.long_summary: Bournemouth moved one step closer to securing European football for the first time in their history after climbing into sixth with a 3-0 win against Crystal Palace at home.
